'''âf-w-v-b''' ('''kafawveboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quartermaster|quartermaster]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quartermaster|quartermaster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-w-v-b
|-
! Lemma
| kafawveboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thifawveboko || jifawveboko || shifawveboko || kifawveboko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthufawveboko || jujufawveboko || shushufawveboko || kukufawveboko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thufawveboko || jufawveboko || shufawveboko || kufawveboko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thufawveboko || jufawveboko || shufawveboko || kufawveboko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thefawveboko || jefawveboko || shefawveboko || kefawveboko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothofawveboko || jojofawveboko || shoshofawveboko || kokofawveboko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thofawveboko || jofawveboko || shofawveboko || kofawveboko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thofawveboko || jofawveboko || shofawveboko || kofawveboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fawveboko || fawveboko || fawveboko || fawveboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fawveboko || fawveboko || fawveboko || fawveboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fawveboko || fawveboko || fawveboko || fawveboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fawveboko || fawveboko || fawveboko || fawveboko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠfawveboko || jĂŠfawveboko || shĂŠfawveboko || kĂŠfawveboko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathafawveboko || jajafawveboko || shashafawveboko || kakafawveboko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thafawveboko || jafawveboko || shafawveboko || kafawveboko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thafawveboko || jafawveboko || shafawveboko || kafawveboko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shafawvebithi || shafawvebiji || shafawvebishi || shafawvebiki
